writing.title: Writing Task 2: Describe a notable person
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing a notable person, using relative clauses with "who".
writing.sampleAnswer: She is the woman who won a major award last year. I know a runner who has competed in many countries. He is an engineer who works for a big company.
checklist: Mô tả được ít nhất 2 người khác nhau
Câu văn mạch lạc, không lặp cấu trúc

writing.title: Writing Task 2: Describe a special place or moment
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing a special place or moment, using relative clauses with "which/that", "where", and "when".
writing.sampleAnswer: This is the café where we first met. I remember the day when we started this project. That is the building which was designed by a famous architect.
